inputs.label: Bytes
inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of bytes to convert to kilobytes

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output

inputs.label: Conversion Base
inputs.businessContext: 1024 for binary (IEC) kilobytes, 1000 for decimal (SI) kilobytes

inputs.label: Rounding Mode
inputs.businessContext: 0: No rounding, 1: Round half up, 2: Ceil, 3: Floor

formulas.result: (() => { const e = exact; const m = Math.pow(10, precision); const rm = roundMode; if (rm === 0) return e; if (rm === 1) return Math.round(e * m) / m; if (rm === 2) return Math.ceil(e * m) / m; return Math.floor(e * m) / m; })()

breakdown: Rounded according to mode {{roundMode}} with {{precision}} decimal places: {{result}} KB
